pair: Loggerhead Shrike vs Great Grey Shrike

rules.pair: Loggerhead Shrike vs Great Grey Shrike
rules.rule: If the black mask extends across the forehead above the bill base, it is a Loggerhead Shrike.

rules.pair: Loggerhead Shrike vs Great Grey Shrike
rules.rule: If the forehead above the bill base is pale/grey (mask does not cross above bill), lean toward Great Grey Shrike.

rules.pair: Loggerhead Shrike vs Great Grey Shrike
rules.rule: If a white rump patch is visible as the bird flies, it is a Great Grey Shrike.

rules.pair: Loggerhead Shrike vs Great Grey Shrike
rules.rule: If the bird is noticeably large and long-tailed, lean toward Great Grey Shrike.

rules.pair: Loggerhead Shrike vs Great Grey Shrike
rules.rule: If the underparts show fine grey barring, it is a Great Grey Shrike.

rules.pair: Loggerhead Shrike vs Great Grey Shrike
rules.rule: If underparts are clean white with no barring, lean toward Loggerhead Shrike.
